CONTENT.Career: Leroy joined the youth academy of Rennes at the age of 8, and spent most of his football development there. On 6 February 2019, he signed his first professional contract with Châteauroux. He made his professional debut with Châteauroux in a 2–2 Ligue 2 tie with Brest on 1 March 2019.On 28 May 2021, Leroy signed with Montpellier.On 21 June 2024, Leroy signed for Swiss club Basel.
CONTENT.Personal life: Leroy is the son of the French former footballer Jérôme Leroy.
CONTENT.External links: Léo Leroy at SoccerwayLéo Leroy – French league stats at Ligue 1 – also available in French

SUMMARY: Léo Leroy (born 14 February 2000) is a French professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Swiss Super League club Basel.
